title: Air Conditioner Construction Description - A/C Pressure Switch

blocks.text: Air Conditioner Construction Description - A/C Pressure Switch

This switch is mounted on the receiver pipe at the condenser outlet and turns the ACS signal ON/OFF according to the refrigerant pressure in the A/C system. The output signal is sent to the PGM-FI ECU, which controls the A/C compressor clutch relay ON/OFF and radiator fan control. Refrigerant pressure in the system is 2,550 kPa (26.00 kgf/cm) 2 ) kPa or higher, or 196 kPa (2.00 kgf/cm) 2 When the A/C compressor clutch relay is turned off to protect the system, the A/C compressor is stopped.
